prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约6583名→5751名→5275名→5591名→5152名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2025年基准位次约5152名，为近五年最优水 平；该校在贵州省理科（物理类）招生计划持续扩增：2021年54人、2022年56人、2023年59人、2024年63人、2025年66人；2026年计划大幅增至103人，较2025 年扩招约56%，显著增加录取机会，对位次有较大后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第36名，稳居全国前40，属于 中上层次理工类高校；2026年高考周期内无明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第65位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现显著报考关注升 温信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科；兵器科学与技术为该校传统特色方 向，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与南理工优势学科方向高度匹配，对考生吸引力较强；贵州省2026年物理类考生约20.6万人，与2025年基本持平，竞争总量变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5152名、2026年大 幅扩招约56%带来的位次后移压力，以及学校优势学科与热门专业高度匹配、软科排名靠前等正向因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年明显后移，但扩招对报考热度的稀释效 应部分被学校自身吸引力抵消；预测最低位次约6835名，区间6335–7335名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、智能科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、电子信息工程、光电信息科学与工程、通信工程）
- 微电子科学与工程
- 飞行器设计与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、智能电网信息工程）
- 探测制导与控制技术
- 兵器类（弹药工程与爆炸技术、武器系统与工程）
- 机械类（车辆工程、工业工程、机械工程）
- 武器发射工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 能源动力类（储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、数学与应用数学、应用统计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6335–7335名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（自动化类、探测制导与控制技术、兵器类等），一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类）可冲刺但需位次明显优于区间 下限；三档专业（能源动力类、数学类）作为保底选择。南理工优势学科集中于控制、机械、化工、光学等领域，二档专业学科评估等级高、就业方向明确，性价比较优。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 6583 → 5751 → 5275 → 5591 → 5152, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 5152, the best level in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guizhou Province has been continuously expanding: 54 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 66 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 103, an expansion of about 56% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission opportunities and exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 36th, firmly in the top 40 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 65th (rated as 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no significant signs of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A+, while Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering received an A-, totaling four A- or above disciplines. Armament Science and Technology is the university's traditional characteristic direction, highly correlated with its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely matching NJUST's advantageous disciplines and strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Guizhou Province is about 206,000, roughly the same as in 2025, with little change in overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5152, the downward pressure from the significant 56% enrollment expansion in 2026, and positive factors such as the strong alignment between the university's advantageous disciplines and popular majors, as well as its high Soft Science ranking, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to drop significantly compared to 2025. However, the dilution effect of enrollment expansion on application popularity is partially offset by the university's own attractiveness. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6835, with a range of 6335–7335.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Microelectronic Science and Engineering
- Aircraft Design and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering)
- Detection, Guidance and Control Technology
- Armament (Ammunition Engineering and Explosion Technology, Weapon Systems and Engineering)
- Mechanical (Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Weapon Launch Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Energy and Power (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Mathematics (Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6335–7335, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Detection, Guidance and Control Technology, Armament, etc.) as the main choices. Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) can be attempted as reach options but require rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range. Tier 3 majors (Energy and Power, Mathematics) serve as safety choices. NJUST's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Control, Mechanical, Chemical, and Optical fields. Tier 2 majors have high discipline evaluation grades and clear employment directions, offering good value.

_translation.university_name_en: Nanjing University of Science and Technology
